analysis.reasoning: Core message: The EU claims climate leadership and urges international partners to align COVID-19 recovery with a green transition, referencing the Green Deal and a climate dialogue. EU4: Clearly promoted—positions the EU as a pioneer/leader on climate policy and green transition. EU6: Implicitly promoted—the EU calls on international partners and frames global cooperation for a greener post-COVID recovery, suggesting contribution to a better world. EU1: Not about historical success or overcoming past obstacles. EU2: No emphasis on internal EU unity. EU3: Focus is not on benefits to EU citizens domestically. EU5: Not about human rights or fair causes specifically. Conclusion: EU4 and EU6 apply.
